findings.explanation: "discharge_date" is expected to fall on or after "admit_date" (admission → discharge); 2 row(s) violate that order.
findings.text: 2 row(s) where "discharge_date" is before "admit_date" — a later date cannot precede its earlier date.

findings.explanation: "has_retirement_account" is an adult-only entitlement; 3 row(s) set it true for a minor (age < 18 in "age").
findings.text: 3 row(s) where "age" < 18 but "has_retirement_account" is true — an adult-only status on a minor.
